raw_transcript: You're likely under-dosed. 24,000 units is a starting dose, but for someone with your symptoms and weight loss, we need to be much more aggressive. I'm going to triple your dose to 72,000 units with every full meal, and 36,000 with any snacks.
final_corrected_note: You're likely under-dosed. 24,000 units is a starting dose, but for someone with your symptoms and weight loss, we need to be much more aggressive. I'm going to triple your dose to 72,000 units with every full meal, and 36,000 with any snacks.
